---
title: "About Me"

about:
  template: solana
  image: images/mountain.png
---
<br><br>

## Robert Mullins

I'm a fourth-year Business Studies International student at Dublin City University, specialising in the Japanese language and data analytics.
I'm particularly interested in utilising data analytics to examine public policy and investment, which I have approached in some of my [projects.](projects/index.qmd)

My goals for now involve continuing my education, partiuclarly in relation to international relations, public policy and governence. I am particularly interested in applying quantative methods of analysis onto these fields, which I would do by continuing to devlop my skills with Python and SQL. 

### My Skills:

- **Languages:** English (Native), Japanese (B2), Mandarin (A2)
- **Programming Languages:** Python, CSS, SQL, HTML, R 
- **Software:** Power BI, GitHub, Microsoft Office, GeoDa, ArcGis Pro

<br><br>

### Certifications & Scholarships:

- Japanese Language Proficiency Test N3 (日本語能力試験3級)
- Recipient of the Heiwa-Nakajima Foundation (平和中島財団) Scholarship 2024/2025

| Subject | Type | Title | Date Completed | CPD/CPE Credits |
|---------|------|-------|---------------|-----------------|
| **Kubicle** | | | | |
| Data Presentation Skills | Course | Communicating Data Effectively in Data Presentation Skills | April 5, 2026 | 1.0 |
| Data Security | Course | Keeping Your Information Safe in Data Security | April 5, 2026 | 1.0 |
| Data Presentation Skills | Course | Presenting Your Data in Data Presentation Skills | April 5, 2026 | 1.0 |
| Data Presentation Skills | Course | Telling Stories with Data in Data Presentation Skills | April 5, 2026 | 1.0 |
| Data Security | Course | Handling Data Securely and Responsibly in Data Security | April 5, 2026 | 1.5 |
| Python Fundamentals | Course | Python Fundamentals in Python Fundamentals | May 22, 2025 | 2.0 |
| SQL | Course | Selecting and Filtering Data with SQL in SQL | April 8, 2025 | 2.0 |
| SQL | Course | Understanding SQL Databases in SQL | March 31, 2025 | 1.5 |
| Excel | Course | Text, Time, and Dates in Excel | February 26, 2023 | 2.0 |
| Excel | Course | Lookups and Database Functions in Excel | February 25, 2023 | 2.0 |
| Excel | Course | Charts in Depth in Excel | January 18, 2023 | 1.0 |
| Excel | Course | Pivot Tables in Excel | November 8, 2022 | 2.0 |
| Excel | Course | Formulas and Functions in Excel | November 5, 2022 | 3.0 |
| Excel | Course | Data Manipulation and Formatting in Excel | October 19, 2022 | 2.0 |

<br><br>

### Hobbies:

- Hiking, running, travelling, language learning

<br><br>

### Favourite Music

Here is a small collection of music that I listened to as I created this website:

**Rain Temple**
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5mqYKjQts0Q&list=OLAK5uy_maklQP61CyO9hSe2c68KXizQovlAZl_No >}}

**It Could Happen To You**
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-yX4S7exMtU&list=PLP1lC0FnuI0IbEtblLQ5tPRdziZozavq0 >}}
